prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Alzheimer's Disease
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 84.1 kg; Height 165.4 cm; BMI 30.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 177mg/dL; 9 months ago 214mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 139mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.7kg; 9 months ago 81.8kg; 6 months ago 80.9kg; 3 months ago 82.8kg; current 84.1kg), Height (12 months ago 165.4cm; 9 months ago 165.4cm; 6 months ago 165.4cm; 3 months ago 165.4cm; current 165.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 38U/L; 9 months ago 39U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 36U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 39U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 35U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; current 11mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 286mg/g; 9 months ago 402mg/g; 6 months ago 391mg/g; 3 months ago 280mg/g; current 328mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 169mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.16 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
